title: Babaprata's Fishy Friends
description: Adds in some new collectible fish
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61033dbbe8760f695eede769192c6f304845baca.png)
Babaprata's Fishy Friends is a content mod that expands on gameplay, through fishing with a new fishing rod, and currently 58 new fish to collect, with many more to come! 

## Content

**58 Brand new fish** to collect (with more planned)

A **new fishing rod** to fish up special fish

A **currency system**, as well as progression

## Getting Started

 Advancements are your best friend! Although there aren't that many to follow, the system is relatively simple, and more will be added in the future!

## The Future

Discord ( )

Fossilised Fish ( )

## FAQ

Q:Can I use this mod in...

A: Yes, definitely! I really want to see others use this for additional content, but I do want to be credited when appropriate.

Q: WIll you add...

A: Comment on this mod page, and I will add it in if I deem it fleshed out enough.

## Links
[Curseforge Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/babapratas-fishy-friends)

[Legacy Curseforge Link](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/babapratas-fishy-friends)

A huge thanks to my myxical on the MCreator forums for allowing this project to be made with his custom fishing rod effect tutorial, I couldn't have done it without him.
